meta.name: SWLS Satisfaction With Life Scale
meta.description: The SWLS is a 5-item scale designed to measure global cognitive judgments of one's life satisfaction. It assesses an individual's overall assessment of their quality of life according to their own chosen criteria.
meta.author: Diener, Emmons, Larsen & Griffin (1985)
meta.reference: Diener E, Emmons RA, Larsen RJ, Griffin S. The Satisfaction With Life Scale. J Pers Assess. 1985;49(1):71-75.
meta.instruction: Below are five statements that you may agree or disagree with. Using the 1-7 scale below, indicate your agreement with each item.

questions.text: In most ways my life is close to my ideal
The conditions of my life are excellent
I am satisfied with my life
So far I have gotten the important things I want in life
If I could live my life over, I would change almost nothing

ranges.label: Low Life Satisfaction
ranges.description: Your life satisfaction score is low, indicating significant dissatisfaction with your current life circumstances.
suggestions: Identify specific areas of your life that feel most unsatisfying
Set small, achievable goals to create positive changes
Consider talking to a counselor about strategies to improve life satisfaction
Practice gratitude by noting positive aspects of your daily life
Explore new activities or social connections that align with your values

ranges.label: Below Average Satisfaction
ranges.description: Your life satisfaction is slightly below average. You may have some areas of dissatisfaction that could be addressed.
suggestions: Reflect on what aspects of your life you would most like to change
Focus on strengthening relationships and social connections
Consider whether your daily activities align with your personal values
Try setting meaningful goals that matter to you

ranges.label: Average Satisfaction
ranges.description: Your life satisfaction is within the average range. You are generally content with most areas of your life.
suggestions: Stay open to new experiences and personal growth

ranges.label: High Life Satisfaction
ranges.description: Your life satisfaction is high. You feel very positive about your life circumstances and overall quality of life.
suggestions: Continue the practices and habits that contribute to your well-being
Share your positive outlook and support others around you
Stay engaged with meaningful activities and relationships
